entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A pulse crop (Cajanus cajan Millsp.) that suffers major yield losses from pod borer attack in India.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A pulse crop (Cicer arietinum L.) that suffers major yield losses from pod borer attack in India.

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A pod borer pest that causes significant economic losses in pulse crops.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where pigeonpea and chickpea are grown and attacked by H. armigera.

entities.name: CHEMICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The use of insecticides to manage pests, which is described as risky and unsatisfactory.

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of a plant to resist pest attack, suggested as a key component of IPM.

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A comprehensive pest management strategy that incorporates various control methods.

entities.name: INSECTICIDE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pests to survive exposure to insecticides over time.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL POLLUTION
entities.description: A negative consequence resulting from the use of chemical control methods.

entities.name: TOXICITY
entities.description: A harmful effect associated with the use of insecticides in chemical control.
